[[File:Armadyl crossbow detail.png|left|150px]]
The '''Armadyl crossbow''' is a [[ranging weapon]] that requires a [[Ranged]] level of 70 to wield, and can fire up to and including [[dragon bolts]]. It is dropped only by [[Commander Zilyana]]. This item counts as an [[Armadyl]] item in the [[God Wars Dungeon]].

The crossbow has an [[attack range]] of 8, and the longrange combat style will increase it by 2.

The Armadyl crossbow can be combined with a [[nihil horn]] and 250 [[Nihil shard|nihil shards]] to create the [[Zaryte crossbow]].

==Special attack==
[[File:Armadyl Eye.gif|thumb|250px|A player performing the Armadyl crossbow's special attack, ''Armadyl Eye''.]]
[[File:Armadyl crossbow special attack projectile.gif|left|The projectile from the special attack.]]
The Armadyl crossbow has a [[special attack]], ''Armadyl Eye'', which consumes 50% of the player's special attack energy. Armadyl Eye will, for one shot, double the player's overall accuracy (level + gear accuracy), as well as doubling the base chance of an [[enchanted bolt]]'s special effect to occur.

For example, when performing the special attack with [[diamond bolts (e)|enchanted diamond bolts]], the bolt's special effect, ''Armour Piercing'', would have a 20% chance of activating instead of 10%. If the [[Hard Kandarin Diary]] has been completed, the additional chance given from the diary reward is added after doubling,{{CiteTwitter|author=Mod Ash|url=https://twitter.com/JagexAsh/status/1480491964260925444|date=10 January 2022|archiveurl=https://reldo.runescape.wiki/i/105529|archivedate=11 January 2022|quote=The diary reward adds an extra 10% of the base chance.}} meaning the chance of activating for that shot is increased from 10% to a total of 21%.

==Trivia==
* It is one of two crossbows with a [[Prayer]] bonus, along with its upgraded version, the [[Zaryte crossbow]]. 
* While pretending to form an alliance with [[Armadyl]], [[Commander Zilyana]] stole the Armadyl crossbow from [[Kree'arra]] during the [[God Wars]], keeping it as a trophy of her cunning, explaining why it is dropped by Zilyana instead of Kree'arra.
* The Armadyl crossbow is one of four unique boss drops that are not dropped by the respective bodyguards (excluding hilts or pets), the others being the [[steam battlestaff]], [[Saradomin's light]], and [[staff of the dead]].
* The special attack sound is recycled in other content, likely as easter eggs:
** When cutting trees down, if a [[bird nest]] falls from it, there is a 1/250 chance for the crossbow special attack sound to play instead.
** If using the [[Dream]] spell with a [[jar of dreams]] in the inventory, the sound will be used alongside [[The Nightmare]]'s face popping up.
** There is a small chance that the [[goose]] found north of [[Lumbridge]] will make the sound when petted.
** There is a small chance that [[Huberte]] will make the sound when talked to.
* The Armadyl crossbow uses the same model as the [[hunters' crossbow]], albeit recoloured.
